Video.summary: The action continues on Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) with the highly anticipated second matchup: Delhi takes on Mumbai Pickle Power at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai.This matchup features a spectacular lineup, including Delhi's players Alexa Schule, Eduardo Irizarry, and Willie Chung, against a strong Mumbai squad that includes Brandon Lane, Glauca Lane, and Kim Ngo.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2

Video.summary: Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) kicks off with an exciting matchup between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru team. This matchup begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match: Hyderabad's local talent, Kuldeep Mahajan, faces Bengaluru's Jack Foster from the United States.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

Video.summary: November 28, 2023 - Welcome to week 10 - season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Gilbert Gladiators face-off against the Surprise Stingers.
Video.title: November 28, 2023 - AZ PBL

Image.alt: November 28, 2023 - AZ PBL
November 28, 2023 - AZ PBL
November 28, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: It's the final day of group stage matches on Super Sunday in the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as game Number Six features Pune United battling the Hyderabad Superstars.This is an important game for both teams as they fight for the last remaining spots in the semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2

Video.summary: Experience the excitement of the Mixed Split Pro Age pickleball match on Championship Court. This video features a unique pairing of new partners Schull and Endara, who are familiar with the heat and come from a grinding three-game win in their last match. They face off against the formidable Lee Whitwell and Kafka. With Lee Whitwell's impressive hands and athleticism, and Kafka's hard-hitting forehand and topspin drives, this is a matchup you won't want to miss. Get ready for incredible rallies and a display of top-tier pickleball as these pros battle it out.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara

Video.summary: Witness an unexpected and electrifying Mixed Pro Doubles showdown from the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida! Originally scheduled for a back court, this highly anticipated match featuring Andre Agassi and Anna Leigh Waters was moved to Championship Court due to overwhelming crowd demand, creating an unforgettable atmosphere. Relive every moment as these top players battle it out in a thrilling display of professional pickleball. Don't miss the action from East Naples Community Park – the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Video.summary: At the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, Tina Pisnik and Tammy Emmrich square off against Alix Truong and Milan Rane in the Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal match. Expect aggressive shot-making, quick court coverage, and intense chemistry on both sides as these athletes leave it all on the court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Video.summary: The Oklahoma City Punishers take on the Kansas City Stingers in a mixed team match.
Video.title: NPL - Punishers vs Stingers (Mixed)

Image.alt: NPL - Punishers vs Stingers (Mixed)
NPL - Punishers vs Stingers (Mixed)
NPL - Punishers vs Stingers (Mixed)

Video.summary: The Indianapolis Drivers take on the Coachella Valley Scorpions in a women's NPL team match.
Video.title: Drivers vs Scorpions (Women)

Image.alt: Drivers vs Scorpions (Women)
Drivers vs Scorpions (Women)
Drivers vs Scorpions (Women)

Video.summary: In this US Open semifinal showdown, top seeds Kyle Yates and Andrei Daescu face off against the dynamic duo of Austin Gridley and Mario Barrientos. With strategic finesse and explosive play, both teams battle for a spot in the final. A must-watch clash of styles and strengths on Championship Court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

Video.summary: Watch a Mixed Pro Age pickleball match between the team of Shelby Bates and a partner against the team of Rob Contratto and Renee Chang. This video highlights a matchup of athletes with diverse athletic backgrounds. The caption file reveals that Rob Contratto was a professional ice hockey player and Renee Chang played rugby and soccer in college. Catch all the dinks, volleys, and strategic plays as these two teams battle it out.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Bates/Morariu vs. Contratto/Chang

Video.summary: Watch an exciting Mixed Split Pro Age match featuring the team of Scott Fliegelman and Jillian Braverman against Susannah Barr and Patrick Cote. Scott Fliegelman is a top-10 ranked Senior Pro and co-founder of Boulder Pickleball. His partner, Jillian Braverman, is a well-known professional pickleball player. They face the team of Susannah Barr and Patrick Cote, a pickleball pro and trainer. This match showcases high-level gameplay between four skilled pros.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote

Video.summary: The Arizona Pickleball League is created -- 5 teams in the league, 4 teams make the playoffs, 1 will not. Meet Kyle Koszuta of the Tempe Tornadoes.
Video.title: S01E01 - The Start

Image.alt: S01E01 - The Start
S01E01 - The Start
S01E01 - The Start

Video.summary: Get ready for a one-of-a-kind pickleball experience at the Minto U.S. Open Pickleball Championships, powered by Margaritaville. This video features highlights from the Pro Mixed Doubles match between Valdes/Gabrielsen and Barr/Lane. Watch Brandon Lane's commanding presence on the court, as he strategically positions himself at the kitchen line to capture any balls he can. The tournament is held at a beautiful facility in Naples, Florida, which is unlike any other in the world, and draws tens of thousands of people.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane

Video.summary: Watch a thrilling Mixed Pro Doubles pickleball match between the top-seeded team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro against Peichuan Kao and Ryler DeHeart. Megan Fudge is a highly-ranked professional player who previously played tennis at the University of Illinois, where she met her husband and partner, Ryler DeHeart. DeHeart is a former professional tennis player who is left-handed. Their opponents are Peichuan Kao, a professional pickleball player who won gold at the APP Fort Lauderdale Open, and Jack Munro, a young pro who was the youngest to become a professional at age 12.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro

Video.summary: Get ready for a thrilling Pro Mixed Doubles match featuring the number one ranked team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro taking on Simone Jardim and her brother, Marcelo Jardim. This is the first time these two teams are facing off on the Championship Court. Don't miss the action!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Video.summary: Christine Karges and David Weinbach take on Lee Whitwell and Jaime Oncins in this Mixed Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match.

Video.summary: The action from Day 6 of the World Pickleball League continues with a crucial matchup between the Delhi Dilwale and the Hyderabad Superstars.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Hyderabad - Day 6 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Hyderabad - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Hyderabad - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Hyderabad - Day 6 Tie 2

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a high-stakes Tie 5 showdown. Pune United enters the arena hungry for their first points of the season, facing off against a confident Hyderabad Superstars squad coming off a fresh victory. Watch as top-tier athletes like Katie Morris, Shawn Mendes, and William Sobeck battle through a gauntlet of Women’s Singles, Mixed Doubles, and Men’s Doubles matches. With "hands battles" at the net and strategic "pickle plays" in full effect, every point is a testament to the speed and precision of professional pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1

Video.summary: Hollywood screenwriter and director Doug Ellin & pickleball pro Wes Burrows play against Pickleball pro Parris Todd & teammate Basketball Hall of Famer Rick Barry.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 3

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 3
Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 3
Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 3

Video.summary: Don’t miss this inspiring wheelchair hybrid doubles match from the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships. Adaptive athletes Rob Krizmanich, Michael Lipp, Patick Huletsky, and Jeff Sylvestre bring talent, teamwork, and tenacity to the court in a showcase of the sport’s inclusive future.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Wheelchair Hybrid Doubles 5.0 Gold Match – Krizmanich & Lipp vs Huletsky & Sylvestre

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Wheelchair Hybrid Doubles 5.0 Gold Match – Krizmanich & Lipp vs Huletsky & Sylvestre
US Open 2023 – Wheelchair Hybrid Doubles 5.0 Gold Match – Krizmanich & Lipp vs Huletsky & Sylvestre
US Open 2023 – Wheelchair Hybrid Doubles 5.0 Gold Match – Krizmanich & Lipp vs Huletsky & Sylvestre

Video.summary: Semifinals Friday from the Franklin 2026 US Open Pickleball Championships from the USOP National Pickleball Center in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: LIVE: US Open Pickleball Championships 2026 - Semifinals Friday

Image.alt: LIVE: US Open Pickleball Championships 2026 - Semifinals Friday
LIVE: US Open Pickleball Championships 2026 - Semifinals Friday
LIVE: US Open Pickleball Championships 2026 - Semifinals Friday

Video.summary: In this action-packed Men’s Doubles match from Picklebowl 2023, Riley Newman and Josh Gartman face off against CJ Clinger and Tim Parks. These top pickleball players go head-to-head in a fast-paced, competitive match that features strategic plays, intense rallies, and plenty of drama. As the players represent their alma maters, the stakes are high as they battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Drew Fieldhouse and Dave Fleming highlights the strategic nuances of the game while adding expert insights into each player’s performance. Watch these elite athletes showcase their skills in this thrilling charity event for the Wuerffel Foundation.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks
Picklebowl 2023 – Men’s Doubles – Newman & Gartman vs Clinger & Parks

Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2018 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold

US Open Pickleball Championships 2018 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold
